package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_over_map_for_deterministic_first: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag map iteration used to pick a deterministic first value, causing unstable work and extra sorting later.
type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirst(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationRangeOverMapForDeterministicFirstDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_collection_iteration"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    m := make(map[string]int)
    for i, item := range items {
        m[item.ID] = i
    }
    var first string
    for k := range m {
        first = k
        break
    }
    _ = first
    perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "collection": 3, "iteration": 4, "range": 5, "over": 6}
    perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    collection_positive_2 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive["collection"] + len(input)
    _ = collection_positive_2
    for iteration_positive_3Index, item := range items { perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive[item.ID] = iteration_positive_3Index }
    range_positive_4 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive["range"] + len(input)
    _ = range_positive_4
    over_positive_5 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_range_positive["over"] + len(input)
    _ = over_positive_5
    return nil
}
